one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Consolidated entities include KFN Market Husky, Kawacatoose Enterprises, Kawacatoose General Store Limited Partnership, Kawacatoose Business Development Corporation, and Asiniw Resources Ltd. Member of Touchwood Agency Tribal Council Inc. Partnership with Indigena KFN Real Estate ULC for land development.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 - this is a 2023 year-end statement, not 2024. Six subsidiaries fully consolidated including retail/business operations. Two trusts (Treaty Land Entitlement Trust and Specific Claim Trust) excluded from consolidation as Chief and Council do not control them. Net debt position of $9.8M. Large deferred revenue balance of $6.98M primarily ISC-funded programs. CMHC housing loans outstanding. Peace Hills Trust consolidation loan of $2.67M remaining. New capital leases for heavy equipment totaling $598,956 acquired during year. No remuneration schedule extracted from provided text.
